markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Recalibrate content strategy for Tribe AI to focus on high-quality, expert-driven content that scales Jackie's in-person impact.](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift from SEO-driven approach to creating deep, valuable content from Tribe AI's unique expertise and insights](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Leverage existing presentations, workshops, and internal knowledge to create a rich knowledge base for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focus on quality over quantity, aiming for content that resonates with enterprise buyers and showcases thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Implement a multi-channel content strategy including articles, social posts, newsletters, and potentially a podcast](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Moving away from shallow SEO-focused articles to deep, expert-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Utilizing Tribe AI's internal expertise, presentations, and workshop materials as primary content sources](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aiming to scale Jackie's in-person impact through high-quality, insightful content](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Focus on creating content that enterprise customers find valuable in their buying journey](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Start with ingesting existing materials (presentations, transcripts, internal docs) into a knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Use AI tools to process and structure information from various sources](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Create a custom vector database for efficient information retrieval and cross-referencing](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Implement a workflow to decompose presentations into individual articles, then recompose into larger pieces](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Content Formats and Distribution

  - [Create concise, insight-packed articles similar to "cliff notes" for easy consumption](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Develop a regular cadence of social media posts, particularly on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Aggregate content into newsletters for broader distribution](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of starting a podcast to further leverage expert knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Automation and Scaling

  - [Utilize AI tools for content generation, structuring, and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Implement systems to build and maintain knowledge bases from curated expert sources](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Use tools like Notion's transcription and AI-powered organization features for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)

### Measuring Success

  - [Focus on generating high-quality leads and opportunities rather than just SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Aim for content that assists in the buying journey and showcases Tribe AI's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Track the impact of content on generating interest and demand, especially through social sharing and direct referrals](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jackie to provide access to presentation slides, transcripts, and other relevant internal materials](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Marcel and team to ingest provided materials and create a knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Develop and present a sample article based on Jackie's upcoming presentation for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Explore options for high-quality portable audio recorders for capturing in-person talks](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting in 4-6 weeks to review progress and discuss long-term content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/p6BAJLQ4xkqcZpxvidzJxp2o3bqsXrdN?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
